title: Shark-Tuff® Heavy Duty Secateurs & Pruning Scissors Pruning Shears for Gardening | High Carbon Steel SK5 Blade Garden Scissors | Bypass Hand Pruners with Long Handles
features: ✅ QUALITY PROMISE : These durable secateurs are manufactured with a #50 high-strength carbon steel SK-5 blades and improved safety-lock for optimum trimming & cutting experience. Professional garden scissors without a hefty price tag. Love them or we take it back. No Questions Asked.
✅ ERGONOMIC COMFORT : Professional garden pruning shears for plants & small trees with a safety lock & long aluminium handle with rubber grip for user comfort & fatigue-free pruning and gardening.
✅ EFFORTLESS PRESCISION : Light weight garden pruners that glides through the branches of upto 3/4 inch thick without sticking providing very precise and clean cut.
✅ PERFECT FOR DEAD-HEADING AND PRUNING : These are Bypass Secateurs which makes them perfect for trimming fresh plants & small trees, flower picking, fruit picking, bonsai trees and more.

✅ To extend the lifespan of your secateurs / gardening scissors, clean the blades of sap and debris after each use, then apply oil to the blade and all moving parts, including the spring coil. Regularly sharpen the blades using a ceramic stone or fine file.
description: Product Description SHARP HIGH CARBON STEEL SK5 TEFLON COATED BLADE ROBUST ONE CLICK LOCK MECHANISM ALUMINIUM HANDLE WITH RUBBER GRIP FOR USER COMFORT RUST FREE MATERIAL FRUIT PICKING FLOWER PICKING BONSAI TRIMMING GENERAL TREE MAINTENANCE
